overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a vehicle journey through Night City's industrial district during golden hour. The player drives beneath massive elevated highway structures, navigating multi-lane roads and stopping at traffic lights at intersections marked 'El Camino Real' while surrounded by futuristic industrial architecture and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane industrial highway beneath elevated expressways

events.description: steering left around industrial storage tank complex
slowing to stop at red traffic light at Barranca intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial district beneath massive elevated highways, following traffic flow toward intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead in same lane maintaining steady speed
silver car driving parallel in adjacent right lane

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway structure with support pillars spanning across the road
large cylindrical industrial tanks with metal pipes and valve structures
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying pink and purple graphics with female figure
green highway directional sign with white text indicating El Camino Real

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath towering elevated highway structures through an industrial zone, passing large storage tanks on the left and a glowing digital billboard on the right. The vehicle follows traffic toward the El Camino Real intersection as the sun sets ahead, casting long shadows and warm orange light across the concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection of El Camino Real and Barranca with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: stopped at red light, waiting for signal to change
traffic light turns green, beginning to accelerate through intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light at Barranca intersection, observing pedestrians on sidewalks and cross traffic moving through

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing at corner waiting to cross the street
black car turning left through the intersection from cross street

entered.detail: green street sign with white text indicating Barranca avenue mounted on overhead gantry
overhead traffic signal array showing red light above the intersection
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on road surface

segments.scene_description: Stopped at the Barranca intersection beneath the elevated highway, waiting at a red light as the sun creates a bright glare ahead. Pedestrians wait at the corners while cross traffic moves through the intersection, and the crosswalk stripes are visible in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor beneath elevated highway ramps and metal scaffolding

passing under complex elevated highway interchange with multiple ramp levels

entered.detail: complex multi-level steel and concrete highway interchange with merging ramps overhead
metal framework and industrial pipes lining the right side of the roadway

segments.scene_description: Driving through the industrial corridor beneath a maze of elevated highway ramps and metal scaffolding. The road stretches ahead toward the next intersection while the warm sunset light filters through the concrete structures, creating dramatic shadows across the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection of El Camino Real and Hargreaves beneath highway overpass

events.description: stopped at red light at Hargreaves intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light at the Hargreaves intersection, observing cross traffic and waiting for signal change

notable_agents.action: silver sports car driving through intersection from left to right
black sedan crossing the intersection perpendicular to ego direction

entered.detail: green street sign with white text indicating Hargreaves street mounted on overhead structure
traffic signal suspended over intersection showing red light
yellow striped pedestrian crosswalk markings across the road

segments.scene_description: Stopped at the Hargreaves intersection beneath the massive highway structure, waiting at a red light as various vehicles cross through the intersection. The El Camino Real sign is visible overhead alongside the Hargreaves street sign, with the crosswalk stripes marking the pedestrian path in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane industrial highway approaching Santa Anna intersection

events.description: accelerating through the Hargreaves intersection as light turns green
approaching the Santa Anna intersection with new street signage visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the Hargreaves intersection and continuing toward the Santa Anna junction, maintaining speed with traffic flow

segments.scene_description: Driving through the Hargreaves intersection as the traffic light turns green, continuing down the industrial highway toward the Santa Anna intersection. The road remains flanked by massive elevated highway structures while the Santa Anna sign becomes visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a dense industrial corridor that transitions from a sun-drenched highway approach to a series of structured urban intersections. It begins beneath towering elevated highway structures, passing large storage tanks and a glowing digital billboard as the setting sun casts long shadows and warm orange light across the concrete. As the vehicle reaches the Barranca intersection, the camera pauses at a red light amidst a bright solar glare and waiting pedestrians before moving forward again through a maze of metal scaffolding and highway ramps. The scene then shifts to another stop at the Hargreaves intersection, where the El Camino Real sign is visible overhead while cross traffic flows through the foreground crosswalks. Finally, the light turns green and the camera accelerates away from the intersection, continuing down the industrial highway toward the distant Santa Anna sign.
